category_sources: Official README mirror at https://github.com/meli/meli describes meli as a BSD/Linux/macOS terminal email client.
source_facts.description says "Terminal e-mail client and e-mail client library".
display_name_sources: Official README and main repository use the lowercase name meli.
docs_sources: Official README links to the Quickstart tutorial on meli-email.org.
Official README says manual pages are hosted online and identifies meli(7), meli.conf(5), and related man pages as documentation.
repo_sources: Official README says the main repository is https://git.meli-email.org/meli/meli and GitHub is only an official mirror.
tags_sources: Official README lists supported backends including IMAP, Maildir, mbox, JMAP, and NNTP.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal email client and library.
